Synthesised into: wiki/general/foot_health.md , wiki/general/gear.md --- ## SECTION A — FOOT ORTHOSES / INSOLES --- ## Paper 1 — Pires Neves et al.

2022 ⭐ META-ANALYSIS — ORTHOSES REDUCE INJURY RISK Title: Effects of Foot Orthoses on Pain and the Prevention of Lower Limb Injuries in Runners: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis Authors: Pires Neves M et al.

Journal: Journal of Sport Rehabilitation Year: 2022 (Nov 1); Epub Jul 2022 PMID: 35894921 DOI: 10.1123/jsr.2021-0302 Type: Systematic Review + Meta-Analysis (12 RCTs, n=5,321 runners ) Key findings: - Control group injury rate: 37% ; foot orthoses group: 24% - Risk ratio = 0.60 (95% CI 0.5–0.7, p<0.00001) — moderate-quality evidence - 40% reduction in lower limb injury risk with foot orthoses vs.
